metadata.name: Governed ETL Data Pipeline
metadata.description: Standard Extract, Transform, and Load pipeline executing under strict quota governance and sandbox policies.
metadata.author: GhostStack Core Developer

tasks.title: Extract Page Scraped Data
tasks.description: Scrapes data from the target website using the sandbox-safe scraping execution adapter.

tasks.title: Transform & Filter Content
tasks.description: Extracts matches matching high-priority patterns using the memory planning-engine.

tasks.title: Load Content to Storage
tasks.description: Saves transformed content to persistent S3 bucket and verifies checksum via the runtime manager.
